data.title: Grace Adventures Ministries President, Steve Prudhomme, retires after 3 decades of service effective March 31, 2026.
data.description: A prominent organization, Grace Adventures Ministries, based in Silver Lake, Michigan, which has been at the forefront of developing students and supporting families since 1946, has disclosed the retirement of its President, Steve Prudhomme. His retirement is set to take place on March 31, 2026, marking the conclusion of his close to thirty years of dedicated tenure.
Finnish PM Stubb Says It’s Correct For Europe To Avoid Buying Russian Oil And Gas

data.title: Roger Ver reportedly reaches deal with US DOJ on tax charges after being accused of tax evasion in April 2024 post renouncing US citizenship.
data.description: In April 2024, the individual known as Bitcoin Jesus faced tax evasion charges for his failure to pay taxes after renouncing his US citizenship. This occurred several years after he gave up his citizenship.

data.title: Bird Construction Inc. to release 2025 third quarter financial results on Nov. 12, conference call on Nov. 13 at 10am ET. TSX: BDT.
data.description: Bird Construction Inc. (TSX: BDT) of Mississauga, Ontario, disclosed plans to reveal its third quarter financial results for 2025 after the market closes on November 12, 2025. An ensuing conference call and live webcast to review the outcomes are scheduled for 10:00 a.m. (ET) on November 13, 2025.
Microsoft Azure Support Says Engineers Investigating Issue Impacting Azure Portal

data.title: Mixed outlook for #Bitcoin and #XRP as prediction market users are positive, but traders advised caution on charts.
data.description: A large number of users in the prediction market are optimistic about the future of Bitcoin and XRP. However, despite this positive sentiment, the charts indicate that traders may need to exercise caution and not get too carried away with their optimism.

data.title: Aludyne sells North American assets to Linamar for $300 million.
data.description: In Southfield, Michigan, Aludyne Inc., a global provider of lightweighting solutions to the mobility sector, has revealed a deal to sell specific assets of its North American operations, Aludyne North America, to Linamar Corporation. The agreement, valued at $300 million, encompasses the majority of Aludyne's North American-based operations.
Venture Global Loses Legal Dispute With BP Over Contested Liquefied Natural Gas Cargoes, Reports Financial Times

data.title: Elong Power notified of non-compliance with Nasdaq listing rules 5450(a)(1), 5450(b)(2)(A), and 5450(b)(2)(C) on Oct. 3, 2025.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, Elong Power Holding Limited (NASDAQ: ELPW) disclosed the receipt of a notification letter on October 3, 2025, from The Nasdaq Stock Market Inc.'s Listing Qualifications Department. The details of the contents were not specified, as of yet.

data.title: Hypercharge plans to offer Units for up to $4M through a brokered LIFE offering.
data.description: An estimated 10,000 people attended the protest march against climate change in the city today. The demonstrators demanded more action from the government to combat environmental issues and reduce carbon emissions. The event took place peacefully, with participants holding banners and chanting slogans calling for urgent measures to protect the planet. The protest lasted for four hours and caused minimal disruption to the city traffic. Authorities reported no incidents or arrests during the demonstration. The organizers expressed satisfaction with the turnout and vowed to continue advocating for sustainable practices and policies. The protest received extensive coverage on social media, reaching over 100,000 individuals online. This successful event highlights the growing public concern and activism regarding climate change.

data.title: New private placement offering announced by Integral Metals. No specific numbers provided.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to its lowest level in a decade, standing at 4.2%. The number of new jobs created in the last quarter has exceeded expectations, with a total of 250,000 new jobs added to the economy. Additionally, the stock market has shown a significant increase, with the main index rising by 5% in the past month. This positive trend is indicative of a strengthening economy and is welcomed news for both businesses and individuals alike.

data.title: TC Energy Corporation announces TCPL's closing of US$350 million Junior Subordinated Notes offering, co-led by Morgan Stanley and BofA Securities.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on October 9, 2025, TC Energy Corporation (TRP on TSX and NYSE) disclosed the closure of an offering by TransCanada PipeLines Limited (TCPL) for US$350 million in 6.250% Fixed-for-Life Junior Subordinated Notes maturing on November 1, 2085. The Notes were issued through a group of underwriters, with Morgan Stanley & Co. LLC, BofA Securities, Inc., J.P. Morgan Securities LLC, RBC Capital Markets, LLC, and Wells Fargo Securities, LLC leading the syndicate.

data.title: CCC Intelligent Solutions changes ticker symbol from "CCCS" to "CCC" on NASDAQ. Effective Oct 31, 2025. Common stock to trade under new symbol.
data.description: Chicago-based CCC Intelligent Solutions Holdings Inc. (CCC) (NASDAQ: CCCS), a prominent cloud platform for the insurance industry, revealed plans to alter its ticker symbol from "CCCS" to "CCC." Starting October 31, 2025, their common stock will be traded on NASDAQ under the updated symbol "CCC." Stockholders need not take action regarding this change, as the company's common stock maintains its listing on NASDAQ.

data.title: Timothy Millican appointed as General Manager of Element U.S. Space & Defense in Camden, AR testing facility. #EUSSD
data.description: In Camden, Arkansas, Element U.S. Space & Defense, a prominent provider of test and engineering services for the U.S. Department of Defense and its industry counterparts, has appointed Timothy Millican as the General Manager of its munitions and energetics testing facility. Millican will oversee key operations and spearhead growth initiatives by enhancing and expanding the facility’s capabilities for testing ordnance and munitions. This move is aimed at bolstering innovation and driving progress in the realm of defense technology.

data.title: WNS acquisition by Capgemini sanctioned by Royal Court of Jersey. $WNS to be acquired by Capgemini S.E.
data.description: In a recent announcement from New York, London, and Mumbai, WNS reported that the approval for its acquisition by Capgemini S.E. has been granted by the Royal Court of Jersey. This significant development signifies a key milestone for the company, marking a strategic move in the industry.

data.title: Brookfield Wealth Solutions completes 3-for-2 stock split of class A shares. Shareholders receive 1 additional share for every 2 held.
data.description: Brookfield Wealth Solutions Ltd. (BNT) has completed a three-for-two stock split for its class A exchangeable limited voting shares. This split involved giving shareholders an additional half of a class A share for every two shares held, resulting in one extra share per two held. Any fractional shares resulting from the split will be compensated in cash, determined by the closing price of the class A shares on the Toronto Stock Exchange on the record date, October 3, 2025. Following this, the class A shares will be traded according to the post-split ratio starting from the market open on Friday, October 10, 2025.
Boeing Exec Says Offer Amount Not Changing; Defense Chief Notes Pay Package On Table Is Best Offer In Letter To Striking Workers

data.title: iPower Inc. reported Q4 revenue of $11.5M (down from $19.5M last year), with a net loss of $2.8M. Reduced total debt by 41% in FY25. Shifted focus to U.S.-based inventory. Maintained gross margin at 43.8%, despite revenue drop. Increased operating expenses to $8.5M. Cash at $2.0M, total debt at $3.7M. CEO highlights strategic realignment, operational optimization, and stakeholder value creation. Company pursuing initiatives in digital assets and blockchain integration.
data.description: iPower Inc. reported financial results for the fiscal fourth quarter and full fiscal year ended June 30, 2025. In Q4 2025, total revenue was $11.5 million (down from $19.5 million), gross profit was $4.9 million (down from $8.7 million), with a net loss of $2.8 million compared to a net income of $0.7 million in the previous year. For the full fiscal year 2025, total debt was reduced by 41% to $3.7 million, gross margin was maintained at 43.8%, and the company transitioned to a primarily U.S.-based inventory model. They also launched a joint-venture manufacturing line and added new brand partnerships. Looking forward, iPower aims to expand their partner network and manufacturing infrastructure.

data.title: Levi Strauss beats Q3 earnings, reports 34 cents per share, $1.54 billion revenue, stock slips despite good results.
data.description: After the closing bell, Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE: LEVI) unveiled its third-quarter earnings report. They reported a quarterly profit of 34 cents per share, surpassing the anticipated 31 cents. Despite stellar performance in the second quarter, investors may have expected a more significant beat. The quarterly revenue stood at $1.54 billion, exceeding the analyst consensus of $1.5 billion, with an increase from the previous year's quarter revenue of $1.44 billion. For more details, please refer to the full story on Benzinga.com. Check out the real-time movement in LEVI stock prices.

data.title: Sun Communities, Inc. will release Q3 2025 results on Oct 29 after market closes, with conference call on Oct 30 at 2:00 P.M. ET.
data.description: Sun Communities, Inc., a REIT specializing in MH and RV communities, is set to unveil its Q3 2025 operating results on October 29. Following this, a conference call will take place on October 30 at 2:00 P.M. ET to analyze these results. Sun Communities, Inc. operates numerous properties and its stock is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol SUI. Keep an eye out for their financial performance updates.
